title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: YouTube video covering major AI developments including self-evolving models (AlphaEvolve), new image generation (HiDream-O1), video models (UniVidX, SwiftI2V), robotic systems (Gene 26.5, PhysForge), language models (Gemma 4, Zaya1), and voice capabilities (GPT Realtime 2). The video reviews tools, techniques, and products across vision, language, robotics, and multimodal AI domains.
